title: AI News Monitor
description: The user wants to create an AI system that monitors news.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: AI News Monitor (DEM-2026-0068)

Executive Summary
This project will develop an automated AI-powered news monitoring system on our AI/ML Platform. The system will track and analyze global news feeds to deliver real-time, actionable insights.

Business Value and Impact
The solution will reduce manual monitoring efforts and accelerate strategic decision-making. It delivers a competitive edge by identifying market trends and emerging risks ahead of competitors.

Risk Mitigation
To mitigate medium-level project risks, we will establish rigorous data validation to prevent misinformation. Continuous model monitoring and retraining will ensure ongoing accuracy and system reliability.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 54% overall available capacity.
All required technical skills are available in the current workforce pool.
